name: Name
tap_to_select_pdf: Tap to select a PDF file
author: Author
app_description: AI-powered research paper assistant for searching, summarizing and exploring papers.
tap_to_upload_ai: Tap to upload and get AI summary
help_text: If you need any help or are facing issues while using the app, you can reach out to our support team at any time. You can also visit the FAQs section to find quick answers to common questions and learn how to use the app effectively.
terms_text: By using this application, you agree to follow our terms and conditions. These include proper use of the app, respecting content guidelines, and complying with applicable rules and policies. Please read them carefully before continuing to use the service.

features.heading: Features
features.subtitle1: Uses advanced Gemini AI for smart document understanding and accurate responses.
features.subtitle2: Analyzes complex academic papers, technical content, and detailed concepts effectively.
features.subtitle3: Creates short and clear summaries from long research papers in seconds.
features.subtitle4: Finds conclusions, methods, findings, and important highlights automatically.
features.subtitle5: Saves hours of reading by giving the most important information quickly.
features.subtitle6: Upload research papers directly in PDF format for instant analysis.
features.subtitle7: Perfect for assignments, literature review, thesis work, and learning.

main.part2: to help you understand research faster. Upload papers, generate smart summaries, and discover knowledge in seconds with next-generation intelligence.

dashboard_insights.heading: Upload Once, Learn Instantly
dashboard_insights.subheading: Submit any research paper and receive clear AI-generated insights that transform difficult academic material into practical and easy-to-understand knowledge.
dashboard_insights.subpart1: Recognizes the main subject of the document by identifying the title and central theme for faster understanding.
dashboard_insights.subpart2: Creates a simplified summary that explains the core ideas in plain language with better clarity.
dashboard_insights.subpart3: Understands the key issue, limitation, or research question the study is attempting to address.
dashboard_insights.subpart4: Shows the most valuable results, conclusions, and discoveries presented in the paper.
dashboard_insights.subpart5: Explains where the research can be applied in business, education, healthcare, or industry.
dashboard_insights.subpart6: Describes the solution, framework, or techniques used by the authors to solve the problem.
dashboard_insights.subpart7: Highlights future improvements, open challenges, and directions for continued research.

insights.heading: One Upload, Instant Understanding
insights.subheading: Upload a research paper and receive structured AI-powered insights that break down complex academic content into simple, actionable understanding.
insights.subpart1: Identifies the exact research focus by extracting the main heading or inferred topic of the paper for quick context understanding.
insights.subpart2: Generates a human-readable summary that explains the paper in simple language without technical complexity.
insights.subpart3: Detects and explains the core problem or research gap the paper is trying to solve in real-world or academic terms.
insights.subpart4: Highlights important results, discoveries, or experimental outcomes that define the contribution of the research.
insights.subpart5: Maps the research into practical applications across industries, education, or real-world systems.
insights.subpart6: Explains the methodology, algorithm, or approach used by researchers to solve the identified problem.
insights.subpart7: Suggests improvements, limitations, and possible future research directions to extend the work further.
